steps.title: Separate the two statements
steps.content: The first statement says Isabel and Ruben Toledo redesigned costumes and sets for a production of The Nutcracker. The next statement says reviewers believed their designs infused the production with Miami's Latin American culture.

steps.title: Avoid fused sentences
steps.content: Choice A places according after the title without a proper boundary. Choice B leaves two full statements joined only by commas. Choice C also lacks the punctuation needed between the title and the reviewers' claim. The answer is D.
